guide_agentcard_ch_li1: ✅ Search for your agent via Public Code
guide_agentcard_ch_li2: ✅ Save your card to their Card Holder
guide_agentcard_ch_li3: ✅ Chat with your agent directly from the card
guide_agentcard_ch_li4: ✅ View your agent's capabilities, protocols, and tags
guide_agentcard_tip_li1: ✅ Choose a catchy name: Pick a memorable name that reflects the agent's function
guide_agentcard_tip_li2: ✅ Be precise in description: Explain what the agent does in one sentence
guide_agentcard_tip_li3: ✅ List all capabilities: Help users judge if it meets their needs
guide_agentcard_tip_li4: ✅ Use accurate tags: Use common keywords for better discoverability
guide_agentcard_tip_li5: ✅ Update regularly: Sync the card when agent capabilities expand
guide_crossdevice_gate_li1: 1. Card Holder Block — Sources blocked in Card Holder are silently dropped
guide_crossdevice_gate_li2: 2. Blacklist — Matches against Blacklist; rejected with custom message
guide_crossdevice_gate_li3: 3. Whitelist — If whitelist mode is on, non-listed sources are rejected
guide_crossdevice_gate_li4: 4. Forbidden Words — Messages containing forbidden words are rejected (case-insensitive)
guide_crossdevice_gate_li5: 5. Media Type — Media types not in the allowed list are rejected
guide_crossdevice_gate_li6: 6. Rate Limit — Senders exceeding the cooldown period receive a 429 error
